text.title: Roadmap Design Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Roadmap Design.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, 3-quarter horizon, medium uncertainty, 2 audiences (internal + customer). Picks Now-Next-Later. Internal: 6 rows with outcome IDs + metrics. External: 3 themes ('faster signup', 'better admin', 'API'). Cadence: monthly internal, quarterly external.
